title: selaginella haenkeana
intro: Selaginella haenkeana, also known as Haenke's spikemoss, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. Selaginella haenkeana can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
